evals.prompt: I have a Next.js app on Vercel and I want to add an MCP endpoint so AI agents can use my API. The API has 3 endpoints: GET /recipes (list), GET /recipes/:id (detail), POST /recipes (create). Can you set it up?
evals.expected_output: Creates app/api/mcp/route.ts with createMcpHandler, registers 3 tools with proper annotations (2 readOnly, 1 write), uses streamableHttpEndpoint, installs mcp-handler and zod

evals.prompt: Deploy my Express API as an MCP server on AWS Lambda with SSE transport
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger this skill — this is about AWS Lambda and Express, not Vercel/Next.js

evals.prompt: Set up a remote MCP server with 5 tools for my recipe database on Vercel. I need: search recipes, get recipe details, create recipe, update recipe, and delete recipe. Make sure it works with Claude Desktop and Smithery.
evals.expected_output: Creates the full MCP route with 5 tools, correct safety annotations (search/get are readOnly, create/update are write, delete is destructive), includes prompt templates, mentions Smithery publishing
